---
title: Ancient DNA & Paleogenomics
subtitle: Genómica y ADN antiguo
alias: &ALIAS ancient_dna_paleogenomics
image: featured.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    categories: 
      - *ALIAS
      - "ancient DNA"
      - "paleogenomics"
      - "Denisovan"
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
---

![](featured.jpg)

Description ...

## Related Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
